en: They took you, Nightman, and you don't belong to them
They left me in a world of darkness without your sexy hands
And I miss you, Nightman, so bad
They took you, Nightman, and you don't belong to them
They took you, Nightman, and you don't belong to them
You have defeated the evil that was here
Naturally, for I am the Dayman
You're a master of karate and friendship for everyone
